definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I have a tingling sensation.]

definitions.usage_context_en: A physical feeling resulting from something that happens to or comes into contact with the body.

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The new movie was a sensation.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: The new movie was a sensation.
definitions.usage_context_en: A widespread reaction of interest and excitement.
